# Pixelette Technologies — LLM Crawler Guide
# https://pixelettetech.com
# Last updated: 2026-06-09

## About

Pixelette Technologies is a frontier innovation group founded in 2018, headquartered in London, UK (77 Fulham Palace Road, W6 8JA) with a US office in Naples, Florida. The company delivers blockchain, agentic AI, quantum computing, and decentralised technology solutions for enterprises, startups, and public sector programmes worldwide.

Legal name: Pixelette Technologies Ltd
Contact: sales@pixelettetech.com
UK: +44 2045188226 | US: +1 7732709034

## Services

- AI Development Services: https://pixelettetech.com/ai-development-services
  Custom AI models, intelligent agents, generative AI, NLP, and full-stack machine learning.

- Blockchain Development Services: https://pixelettetech.com/blockchain-development-services
  Smart contracts, decentralised applications, tokenisation, quantum-safe blockchain architectures.

- Quantum Computing Development: https://pixelettetech.com/quantum-development-services
  Hybrid quantum-classical systems, quantum-ready architectures, post-quantum cryptography.

- Web Development Services: https://pixelettetech.com/web-development-services
  Scalable web applications, website redesign, e-commerce platforms.

- Mobile App Development: https://pixelettetech.com/mobile-app-development-services
  iOS, Android, and cross-platform mobile applications. 100+ apps shipped since 2018.

- UI/UX Design Services: https://pixelettetech.com/ui-ux-design-services
  User research, wireframing, prototyping, and design-system implementation.

- AR/VR Development Services: https://pixelettetech.com/ar-vr-development-services
  Immersive simulations, AR product visualisation, VR training environments.

- Custom Software Development: https://pixelettetech.com/custom-software-development-services
  ERP, CRM, HRMS, and bespoke enterprise applications.
